$comment: Canonical OHD brand tokens. Source of truth for logo recolor + app palettes.

brand_red.use: Primary brand red; pulse stroke in logos; primary CTAs; links; selected-chip fill; OHD-Identity wordmark accent.

deep_red.use: Hover / pressed / depressed states of brand_red. Error or danger emphasis. Never next to a primary CTA.

accent_tint.use: Soft red overlay for warning / call-out backgrounds. Same RGB as brand_red, 10% alpha so it composes onto either white or black surfaces without manual two-tone variants.

ink.use: Default text on light surfaces; shield silhouette in logos; surface on dark theme.

paper.use: Default text on dark surfaces; logo silhouette inverted for dark themes; surface tint on light theme cards.

muted.use: Secondary text labels. Derived from ink as a desaturated mid-grey; reads neutral rather than blue-cool.

line_strong.use: Borders that need more emphasis (e.g. social-login style buttons).

surface_alt.use: Raised-card / alternate-row background on the light theme.

black.use: Page background on dark theme; sometimes used as ink in pure-black contexts.
